mapper.select: SELECT user_id, user_name, mu.area_code, ma.area_name, email FROM m_user mu INNER JOIN m_area ma ON mu.area_code = ma.area_code ORDER BY user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO m_user ( user_name, area_code, email ) VALUES ( #{user.userName}, #{user.areaCode}, #{user.email} )
mapper.update: UPDATE m_user SET user_name = #{user.userName}, area_code = #{user.areaCode}, email = #{user.email} WHERE user_id = #{user.userId}
